abilities.name: Nimble
abilities.description: Generates additional AP on turn, only for Movement General Action.

abilities.name: Terrifying (Living) (12)
abilities.description: Enemy Living must pass TN 12 Horror Duel when ending turn in engagement range or targeting.

abilities.name: Unimpeded
abilities.description: Ignores terrain penalties when taking Movement Actions.

actions: (1) Reinforced Executioner Claw (Pugilism) | AV: 7C (16C) | Rg: y2 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 4/5/6 damage. Ram+Crow Decapitate: After damaging, target must discard two Twist or be killed. Mask+Crow Rip in Half: After killing, all enemies within p6 make TN 12 Horror Duel.
(0) Vent Steam | Until start of next turn, area within a4 is Ht 5 soft cover.
(2) Flurry | Discard Twist Card to take three 1 AP attacks with Close Combat weapon vs single target.
system.notes: Amalgamations of flesh and steel. Injured miners saved and transformed by Viktor Ramos. Nearly fanatical loyalty to Union. Fearsome combatants shrug off punishment.
